set(_DESIGN_SYSTEM_DIR
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../../../shared/protocol/design-system/generated")

idf_component_register(
    SRCS "renderer.c" "render_node.c" "style_helpers.c" "icon_map.c"
         "renderers/layout.c" "renderers/atoms.c"
         "renderers/interactive.c" "renderers/data.c"
         # Generated design-system lookup table — paired with design_system.h.
         # Source of truth: shared/protocol/design-system/design-system.yaml,
         # regenerated by `task design-system:gen`.
         "${_DESIGN_SYSTEM_DIR}/design_system.c"
    INCLUDE_DIRS "include" "${_DESIGN_SYSTEM_DIR}"
    REQUIRES esp_lvgl_port state transport
    PRIV_REQUIRES json log esp_event
    # Force the generated moumantai_font_*.c files to link. Their symbols are
    # only referenced via weak externs (for graceful degradation when the
    # fonts haven't been generated yet). Without --whole-archive the linker
    # sees the weak references as already resolved and strips the object
    # files, so the fonts are compiled but never end up in the binary.
    WHOLE_ARCHIVE
)

# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Unified font — auto-regenerated at build time.
#
# The font .c files are gitignored; they're pre-rasterized bitmap tables
# rebuilt from the Noto + Material Symbols TTFs by:
#
#   python3 assets/fonts/build_unified_font.py
#
# CMake runs the generator when (a) the TTFs are present and (b) the .c
# outputs are older than the generator or its inputs. On a fresh clone
# without TTFs, we skip and emit a warning — the weak-extern fallback in
# icon_map.c / style_helpers.c keeps the client running (text renders as
# chip placeholders) so the build still succeeds for non-font work.
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------

set(_FONT_DIR     "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/fonts")
set(_ASSETS_DIR   "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../assets/fonts")
set(_GEN_SCRIPT   "${_ASSETS_DIR}/build_unified_font.py")
set(_TEXT_SIZES   14 20 28)
set(_ICON_SIZES   20 24 32)

set(_TTF_LIST
    "${_ASSETS_DIR}/Inter-Bold.ttf"
    "${_ASSETS_DIR}/NotoSansCJKsc-Bold.otf"
    "${_ASSETS_DIR}/NotoSansSymbols2-Regular.ttf"
    "${_ASSETS_DIR}/NotoEmoji-Regular.ttf"
    "${_ASSETS_DIR}/MaterialSymbolsRounded.ttf"
)

set(_CP_LIST
    "${_ASSETS_DIR}/cjk_sc_codepoints.txt"
    "${_ASSETS_DIR}/emoji_codepoints.txt"
    "${_ASSETS_DIR}/icon_codepoints.txt"
)

set(_ALL_TTFS_PRESENT TRUE)
foreach(_ttf ${_TTF_LIST})
    if(NOT EXISTS "${_ttf}")
        set(_ALL_TTFS_PRESENT FALSE)
    endif()
endforeach()

# All three families: moumantai_text_{N} (primary), moumantai_text_cjk_{N}
# (fallback), moumantai_icons_{N} (icon glyphs only).
set(_FONT_OUTPUTS "")
foreach(_size ${_TEXT_SIZES})
    list(APPEND _FONT_OUTPUTS "${_FONT_DIR}/moumantai_text_${_size}.c")
    list(APPEND _FONT_OUTPUTS "${_FONT_DIR}/moumantai_text_cjk_${_size}.c")
endforeach()
foreach(_size ${_ICON_SIZES})
    list(APPEND _FONT_OUTPUTS "${_FONT_DIR}/moumantai_icons_${_size}.c")
endforeach()

if(_ALL_TTFS_PRESENT)
    find_package(Python3 COMPONENTS Interpreter)
    if(NOT Python3_Interpreter_FOUND)
        message(WARNING "Python3 not found — can't regenerate fonts. "
                        "Install Python to enable automatic font rebuilds.")
    else()
        # Single custom command emits all 9 outputs — the generator writes
        # them in one invocation, so one rule = one re-run.
        add_custom_command(
            OUTPUT  ${_FONT_OUTPUTS}
            COMMAND ${Python3_EXECUTABLE} "${_GEN_SCRIPT}"
            DEPENDS "${_GEN_SCRIPT}" ${_TTF_LIST} ${_CP_LIST}
            WORKING_DIRECTORY "${_ASSETS_DIR}"
            COMMENT "Regenerating moumantai_text_{14,20,28}, moumantai_text_cjk_{14,20,28}, moumantai_icons_{20,24,32}"
            VERBATIM
        )
        add_custom_target(renderer_fonts DEPENDS ${_FONT_OUTPUTS})
        add_dependencies(${COMPONENT_LIB} renderer_fonts)

        foreach(_src ${_FONT_OUTPUTS})
            set_source_files_properties("${_src}" PROPERTIES GENERATED TRUE)
            target_sources(${COMPONENT_LIB} PRIVATE "${_src}")
        endforeach()
    endif()
else()
    message(WARNING
        "Font TTFs missing in assets/fonts/ — the renderer will fall back "
        "to text chips for icons and LVGL placeholder for text. See "
        "assets/fonts/README.md for TTF download URLs, then rerun "
        "`idf.py build`.")
    # Still wire any pre-existing .c files so the build uses them if present.
    foreach(_src ${_FONT_OUTPUTS})
        if(EXISTS "${_src}")
            target_sources(${COMPONENT_LIB} PRIVATE "${_src}")
        endif()
    endforeach()
endif()
